## Description

Effectively remove iron
**
Q²M Iron is one of the most powerful and fastest-working products for removing iron particles, industrial fallout, and brake dust. The advanced formula makes cleaning easier and delivers faster results for both enthusiasts and professionals. 

**Safe for paint, wheels, and glass**

Use Q²M Iron on paint, wheels, trim, and glass. Thanks to its pH-neutral composition, it’s completely safe for all surfaces — even coated cars. It loosens even the most stubborn brake dust or deeply embedded grime. 


During use, Q²M Iron changes color: the liquid turns purple as it reacts with iron particles, showing exactly where it’s working. The updated formula also has a milder scent, making it more pleasant to use.

**Tip**

Use Q²M Iron as part of your regular paint decontamination process, before claying or applying a protective layer. Always work on a cool surface and rinse thoroughly for the best results.


With Q²M Iron, you’ll remove contamination that regular washing can’t touch — for a visibly cleaner and smoother finish.

## Hazard Information

H302: Harmful if swallowed. 

H317: May cause an allergic skin reaction. 

![image](https://cdn.qso.eu/bundles/lenzplatformclp/storefront/img/clp/ghs07.svg?1770287520)

## Manual



- Cool surface – Use in the shade, not on hot panels.

- Spray – Apply generously to paint, wheels, or glass.

- Wait – Let it work for 1–2 minutes. The liquid will turn purple.

- Optional brushing – Use a brush or cloth for stubborn dirt.

- Rinse – Rinse thoroughly with water. Done!


## FAQ

Close menu

Waarvoor gebruik ik Q²M Iron?

Q²M Iron verwijdert vliegroest, remstof, spoorstaal en andere ijzerhoudende vervuiling van lak, velgen, glas en sierlijsten. Perfect als dieptereiniging vóór een wax, sealant of coating.

Hoe lang moet ik het in laten werken?

Laat het 1 tot 2 minuten inwerken. Belangrijk: laat het niet opdrogen, anders kunnen vlekken ontstaan.

Is het veilig voor mijn lak en coatings?

Ja! De formule is pH-neutraal, dus veilig voor alle lakken, velgen, glas én zelfs keramische coatings.

Waarom wordt het product paars tijdens gebruik?

De paarse kleur ontstaat wanneer het product reageert met ijzerdeeltjes. Zo zie je precies waar Q²M Iron werkt.

Kan ik het gebruiken in direct zonlicht of op warme panelen?

Nee, altijd op een koel oppervlak en uit de zon gebruiken. Dit voorkomt opdrogen en strepen.

Moet ik iets gebruiken om te boenen of is spray-en-spoel genoeg?

In de meeste gevallen is spray-en-spoel voldoende. Bij hardnekkige vervuiling kun je een zachte microvezeldoek of kwast gebruiken.

Quick, safe cleaning for paint, wheels, and glass.

Powerful iron removal.


## Removes even stubborn dirt

Q²M Iron dissolves industrial fallout, brake dust, and rail particles quickly and effectively. Even deeply embedded contamination is visibly removed, leaving your paint, wheels, and glass looking clean and smooth.


![image](https://cdn.qso.eu/media/7c/4a/b2/1760513043/DSC02844.jpg?ts=1760513043)

![image](https://cdn.qso.eu/media/d0/36/d7/1760513043/DSC02853.jpg?ts=1760513043)

Safe for all surfaces.


## pH-neutral and coating-friendly

Use Q²M Iron worry-free on paint, glass, wheels, and trim. The pH-neutral formula is gentle on surfaces and safe for ceramic coatings.


Visible results.


## Color change shows it’s working

During use, Q²M Iron turns purple as it reacts with iron particles. This way, you can see exactly where the product is working – fast, effective, and without any guesswork.


![image](https://cdn.qso.eu/media/18/75/bf/1760513043/DSC02857.jpg?ts=1760513043)

Shared on the socials.
